subject: Assignment 3 Deadline Extended
body: Dear students, the deadline for Assignment 3 (Data Structures) has been extended to December 20, 2024. Please submit via the portal. Late submissions will not be accepted.

subject: Hackathon Team Meeting Tomorrow
body: Hey! Let's meet tomorrow at 4 PM in the library to finalize our hackathon project architecture. Bring your laptop and the wireframes we discussed.

subject: Mess Menu Updated for This Week
body: The mess menu for this week has been updated. Monday: Paneer Butter Masala, Tuesday: Chole Rice, Wednesday: Pasta Day. Check the notice board for full details.
